scripts.dev:electron: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail -n ui,electron -c green,magenta "pnpm dev:ui" "wait-on tcp:127.0.0.1:47188 && cd apps/electron && pnpm dev"
scripts.build: pnpm --filter @forge/protocol build && pnpm --filter @forge/backend build && pnpm --filter @forge/ui build
scripts.typecheck: cd apps/backend && pnpm exec tsc -p tsconfig.build.json --noEmit && cd ../ui && pnpm exec tsc --noEmit && cd ../../packages/protocol && pnpm exec tsc -p tsconfig.build.json --noEmit && cd ../../apps/electron && pnpm exec tsc --noEmit
scripts.release:electron: node -e "console.error('Deprecated: official desktop releases must use the build-first, draft-first flow in apps/electron/README.md. This shortcut is intentionally disabled.'); process.exit(1)"
scripts.prod:start: node scripts/check-data-migration.mjs && concurrently --kill-others-on-fail --names backend,ui "cross-env NODE_ENV=production FORGE_PORT=47287 pnpm --filter @forge/backend start" "pnpm --filter @forge/ui preview"
